title: swertia multicaulis var. umbellifera
intro: Swertia multicaulis var. umbellifera is a variant of the Swertia multicaulis plant, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and aid in the relief of fever. The health benefits of Swertia multicaulis var. umbellifera include its use in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. In traditional herbal medicine, Swertia multicaulis var. umbellifera is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and may be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
